calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Continued To Sep-30-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Saul M. Ferster, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court ordered the matter off the settlement conference calendar. The request for jury trial is sticken and the trial date is confirmed.
